plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context. Set via `wzrdx company set`; profile at .wzrdx/company.json (+ company.md for KB ingestion).

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.notes: Standups, ADR drafting, incident post-mortems, technical docs.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.notes: Multi-agent PR review with confidence-based filtering.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.notes: Pre-tool hook warning on unsafe code patterns (command injection, XSS, eval, pickle).

plugins.name: context7
plugins.notes: Live version-specific library docs. Already in use.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.notes: TDD, debugging, planning discipline. Already installed.

plugins.name: github-mcp
plugins.notes: Repo/PR operations (gh CLI covers most flows meanwhile).

plugins.name: qodo-skills
plugins.notes: Repo-specific coding rules + PR resolver. Requires a Qodo platform account; adopt if/when one exists.
